concerns.text: Success Criterion SC-002 conflates the pooled Hedges g estimate (a point estimate) with its precision (95% CI width). It states the CI width should equal the expected pooled g value of -0.425, which is definitionally incorrect and creates a circular validation where the target (CI width) is not independent of the predictor (pooled g). This makes the criterion non‑trivial and scientifically invalid.
